authselect-test-framework

  • View page source

authselect_test_framework.topology

Authselect predefined well-known topologies.

Functions

profile_from_topology_mark(mark)

Resolve Profile enum member from a topology mark.

Classes

Profile(*values)

ProfileGroup(*values)

Groups of authselect profiles for tests that run on every profile.
final class authselect_test_framework.topology.Profile(*values)

Bases: KnownTopologyBase

Local = <authselect_test_framework.config.AuthselectTopologyMark object>
SSSD = <authselect_test_framework.config.AuthselectTopologyMark object>
Winbind = <authselect_test_framework.config.AuthselectTopologyMark object>
class authselect_test_framework.topology.ProfileGroup(*values)

Bases: KnownTopologyGroupBase

Groups of authselect profiles for tests that run on every profile.

The test is parametrized and runs once per profile in the group.

Example usage
@pytest.mark.topology(ProfileGroup.AnyProfile)
def test_example(client: Client, mh_topology_mark: AuthselectTopologyMark):
    assert True
AnyProfile = [Profile.Local, Profile.SSSD, Profile.Winbind]
name: local
fixtures:
  client: sssd.client[0]
  provider: sssd.client[0]
topology:
- id: sssd
  hosts:
    client: 1
domains: {}

name: sssd
fixtures:
  client: sssd.client[0]
  ipa: sssd.ipa[0]
  provider: sssd.ipa[0]
topology:
- id: sssd
  hosts:
    client: 1
    ipa: 1
domains:
  test: sssd.ipa[0]

name: winbind
fixtures:
  client: sssd.client[0]
  samba: sssd.samba[0]
  provider: sssd.samba[0]
topology:
- id: sssd
  hosts:
    client: 1
    samba: 1
domains: {}
authselect_test_framework.topology.profile_from_topology_mark(mark: TopologyMark) → Profile

Resolve Profile enum member from a topology mark.
